data.title: Liquidity Services profit increased driven by B2B marketplace activity
data.description: The company also expanded its digital leadership team, naming Cullen Rowley as vice president of ecommerce.

data.title: Walmart to expand 'content to commerce' through Vizio TVs
data.description: "Walmart and Vizio will progressively implement a unified account login experience for new Vizio OS TVs and onn TVs powered by Vizio, enabling customers to use their Walmart account to access Smart TV features," according to the announcement.

data.title: Ecommerce earnings recap: What you missed from Signet Jewelers, Williams-Sonoma and more
data.description: Ecommerce gave William-Sonoma a boost to comparable brand sales as overall revenue fell in its latest earnings.

data.title: New B2B marketplaces target construction, equipment and data center sourcing
data.description: These platforms are targeting a part of the market that still relies heavily on phone calls, spreadsheets and local relationships, with limited visibility into pricing or availability across regions.

data.title: Coveo adds conversational product discovery to ecommerce search
data.description: It said retailers maintain control over search results through predefined layouts, merchandising rules and content guardrails, even as AI is used to generate responses.
